supportCards.title: Handmade to order, every time
supportCards.text: Each piece is crafted individually — not mass-produced. That means real wood detail, careful engraving and a finish that holds up long after the occasion.

supportCards.title: Personalization is easy to arrange
supportCards.text: Names, dates and short messages can be added to many items. Message the shop on Etsy before ordering and the seller will confirm exactly what's possible.

supportCards.title: Sent with care, arrived beautifully
supportCards.text: Reviews consistently mention good packaging and attentive service. If something goes wrong in transit, the shop resolves it — as several reviewers have noted.

items.title: Clare · 5/5
items.text: "This seller was an absolute pleasure to deal with. I couldn't have asked for a better service before I even placed the order and right the way through the process. I'll be back for more!"

items.title: Tanya · 5/5
items.text: "These coasters are exactly as pictured and the seller has lots of integrity — they helped me resolve a shipping issue and reshipped the product. I'm very grateful and highly recommend this shop."

items.title: Caroline · 5/5
items.text: "Great quality, exactly as described, and seller was kind and communicative! Excited to gift these."

items.title: Daniel · 5/5
items.text: "Absolutely love my coasters. Beautiful. After an issue with the postal service the seller went above and beyond to make sure I received my items. I highly recommend this shop."

items.title: Andrew · 5/5
items.text: "These are beautiful coasters. They are made of wood and seem very durable."

items.title: Alex · 5/5
items.text: "Wow, the craftsmanship on this is spectacular! It even smells like fresh wood. Perfect size for the average book. Thank you!"

faq.question: Where do I order and how does it work?
faq.answer: Browse here to find the right item, then head to Etsy to see full pricing, reviews, personalization options and checkout — all in one place.

faq.question: Can I add a name, date or message to my gift?
faq.answer: Yes. Many items can be personalized. Message the shop on Etsy before ordering and the seller will confirm what's possible for your chosen piece.

faq.question: What is the fastest way to find the right gift?
faq.answer: Start with the featured categories if the occasion is clear, or use the bestseller block if you want a well-loved pick.

faq.question: How do I know the quality is worth it?
faq.answer: The shop holds a 4.96/5 rating on Etsy across hundreds of reviews — each mentioning quality, craft detail and good service. You can read them all before buying.
